overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a futuristic city waterfront promenade, approaching an NPC, and exploring a small elevated homeless encampment with a barrel fire before returning. The scene features neon-lit skyscrapers, cyberpunk architecture, and atmospheric morning lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian promenade transitioning to open waterfront

events.description: exiting covered walkway into open waterfront promenade with full sky visibility

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered promenade toward the open waterfront area with neon skyscrapers visible ahead

entered.detail: dark concrete overhang structure covering the left side of the walkway
tall cylindrical skyscraper with distinctive red neon ring lighting
hexagonal tiled pedestrian walkway with wet reflective surface
raised planters containing spiky yucca plants with integrated orange LED strip lighting

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a partially covered urban promenade with a massive neon-lit skyscraper dominating the skyline ahead. The walkway features modern planters with spiky vegetation and integrated lighting. The scene transitions from the shadowed covered area into the open waterfront as the player moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with city skyline view

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront railing, approaching an NPC standing by orange concrete barriers

notable_agents.action: standing guard by the railing holding a rifle, wearing a green and purple jacket

entered.detail: metal safety railing along the water's edge with orange concrete base
large rectangular concrete blocks with orange paint marking the waterfront edge
illuminated red and blue neon sign reading DROP on building facade
elevated highway or monorail structure spanning across the water

segments.scene_description: The player moves along the open waterfront promenade with unobstructed views of the futuristic skyline across the water. An NPC stands prominently by orange concrete barriers holding a weapon. The camera passes modern planters and approaches the railing overlooking the water with elevated transport bridges visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: stairway ascending to elevated encampment under infrastructure

events.description: beginning ascent of concrete stairs leading to elevated gravel area

agents.ego_description: turning right toward the stairs and climbing up to the elevated encampment area beneath the overpass

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with dark steps leading upward to elevated platform
rough gravel and dirt surface of the elevated encampment area
makeshift shelter constructed from grey tarpaulin sheets and wooden poles
dark concrete underside of the elevated highway or building above

segments.scene_description: The player turns away from the waterfront and approaches a concrete stairway leading up into a darker, enclosed area beneath the city's infrastructure. The environment shifts from the bright open promenade to a shadowy elevated space with gravel ground and makeshift tarp shelters.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated homeless encampment with barrel fire

agents.ego_description: circling around the encampment, observing the characters gathered around the barrel fire and the makeshift living space

notable_agents.action: standing by the fire barrel warming hands, wearing minimal clothing and sunglasses
standing opposite the fire with pink hair and tactical gear, holding a weapon

entered.detail: metal drum barrel with active flames providing warmth and flickering orange light
weathered concrete park benches with wooden slats, used as seating and storage
wooden crates and cardboard boxes stacked on the bench containing supplies

segments.scene_description: The player explores a small elevated encampment where two characters stand around a burning barrel fire while another sits nearby. The area features makeshift tarp shelters, concrete benches with stacked supplies, and is lit by the warm glow of the fire contrasting with the cool ambient light from the surrounding city.

events.description: descending concrete stairs back to the lower waterfront promenade level

agents.ego_description: walking down the stairs and returning along the waterfront promenade, passing other pedestrians

entered.detail: returning to the hexagonal tiled walkway at ground level

segments.scene_description: The player descends the stairs back to the waterfront promenade, leaving the elevated encampment behind. The scene returns to the open waterfront with the DROP sign visible again and the player continues walking along the paved path with the neon city skyline in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, neon-lit urban promenade into a shadowy makeshift encampment before returning to the open waterfront. It begins under a partially covered walkway dominated by a massive skyscraper, moving past modern planters as the scene opens into a wide waterfront view featuring an armed NPC and distant transport bridges. The camera then turns away from the water and ascends a concrete stairway, shifting from the bright promenade into a darker, enclosed space beneath the city's infrastructure. This transition leads into an elevated encampment where the cool ambient light of the city contrasts with the warm glow of a burning barrel fire surrounded by tarp shelters and supplies. Finally, the camera descends the stairs to return to the paved waterfront path, leaving the encampment behind as the neon skyline and a DROP sign reappear in the distance.
